2026-03-30INFCFinancial Administration ActAppointment of Auditor of the Canada Lands Company Limited and its subsidiaries Order appointing the Auditor General of Canada as the auditor of Canada Lands Company Limited and its subsidiaries, Canada Lands Company CLC Limited, Old Port of Montréal Corporation Inc. and Parc Downsview Park Inc. for the fiscal year ending on March 31, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of Auditor of the Canada Lands Company Limited and its subsidiaries
precis: Order appointing the Auditor General of Canada as the auditor of Canada Lands Company Limited and its subsidiaries, Canada Lands Company CLC Limited, Old Port of Montréal Corporation Inc. and Parc Downsview Park Inc. for the fiscal year ending on March 31, 2026.
